name: @unified-ai-system/forge-core
description: Forge — Goal-driven autonomous coding engine, deeply integrated with unified-ai-system

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('better-sqlite3');console.log('[forge] better-sqlite3 native OK')}catch(e){console.log('[forge] Rebuilding better-sqlite3...');const p=require.resolve('better-sqlite3/package.json');const d=require('path').dirname(p);require('child_process').execSync('npx --yes node-gyp rebuild',{cwd:d,stdio:'inherit'})}"
